job_title: View job: Scientist 2-Spatial Biology and Biophysics
job_description:
• 3+ years of relevant experience in situ hybridization, imaging and spatial techniques, preferably in the Biotechnology industry.
• Strong analytical background Strong organizational skills.
• Strong written and oral communication skills.
• Strong troubleshooting and problem solving skills.
• Experience with the 10x Genomics Xenium platform is a plus.
• Skills in image analysis are a plus.
• PhD in Molecular Biology, Biophysics, Physical Chemistry or related field.
• Proven ability to design novel molecular biology assay schemes, as evidenced by peer-reviewed publications or published patents.

job_title: Product Development Engineer, System Level Test (SLT)
job_description:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define SLT strategy, test content, diagnostics, and characterization requirements.
• Experience developing and debugging SLT test programs, test flows, diagnostics, and characterization plans in an NPI environment.
• Experience with platform bring-up, hardware validation, and system-level debugging.
• Experience using Linux, Unix, and Windows environments.
• Programming or scripting experience in languages such as Python, C/C++, Java, Perl, or Ruby.
• Experience working with manufacturing partners and OSATs is a plus.
• RMA debug experience is a plus.
• Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Electronics Engineering, or a related technical discipline preferred.
